title: bidens micrantha var. laciniata
intro: Bidens micrantha var. laciniata, also known as cutleaf biddens, is a variant of the Bidens micrantha plant, a member of the aster family that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and fever. The health benefits of Bidens micrantha var. laciniata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful herb for treating infections and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Bidens micrantha var. laciniata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the specific health condition being treated.
